articles.title: Anthropic disables Fable and Mythos AI models after U.S. government bars it from giving foreigners access - Fortune
articles.description: The directive would even bar Anthropic's own foreign employees from using Fable and Mythos. Anthropic called the government position "a misunderstanding".

articles.title: Why Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPO - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: It was meant to happen once humans were regularly flying to Mars. Then the AI boom took off.

articles.title: Elon Musk's stratospheric rise to trillionaire status - in charts - BBC
articles.description: The BBC breaks down how the tech mogul's fortune has grown.

articles.title: Justice Dept. approves Paramount's acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery - NPR
articles.description: The decision paves the way for a proposed $111 billion merger uniting two rival studio giants — Paramount, owner of CBS, and the much larger Warner, which includes HBO and CNN.

articles.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Ends Higher On Iran Deal Hopes; SpaceX Rockets 19% In Debut - Investor's Business Daily
articles.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rises Friday on U.S.-Iran peace deal hopes. SpaceX stock jumps, making Elon Musk a trillionaire.

articles.title: An Intern Disobeyed His Parents and Joined SpaceX in 2011. Following Its Historic IPO, He and Thousands of Other Employees Are Now Millionaires - inc.com
You can blame America’s plummeting fertility rate on the iPhone, study finds: ‘People are all depressed and alone and doomscrolling’ - Fortune
articles.description: A recent National Bureau of Economic Research paper noted the link between iPhone sales and declining births could be the result of more time on devices.
